name: Claude Code Hooks
description: Installs bash hooks for Claude Code lifecycle telemetry, state tracking, and policy enforcement (self-contained, pinned to v0)

installSessionHooks.description: Install session lifecycle hooks (start, end, setup, compact, etc.)

installAgentHooks.description: Install agent behavior hooks (tool use, permissions, subagents, tasks)

installTurnHooks.description: Install turn-level hooks (prompt submission, stop, notifications)

installStatusLine.description: Also install the status line hook configuration

blockDangerousCommands.description: Block dangerous Bash commands at the PreToolUse hook instead of only logging them

dangerousCommandDenylist.description: Additional comma-separated regex patterns to treat as dangerous when blockDangerousCommands is enabled

stateRetentionLimit.description: Maximum number of entries to retain in per-tool/per-file state objects. Older entries are pruned automatically.
